commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c79ce337c29f1ef4bd67b48b38763d3aa5f816a5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes iMessage direct-handle media sends through `send-attachment`, splits captioned media into attachment plus follow-up text, and adds focused send-path regression tests.

PR surface: Source +45, Tests +62. Total +107 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main only uses `send-attachment` for media-only explicit chat targets, while direct-handle or captioned media can still reach RPC `send` with a `file` field; I did not run a live iMessage bridge repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed to fix the lifecycle finding and provide real iMessage behavior proof; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor's setup.

target.title: fix: route iMessage DM media through attachment handoff
target.body:
## Summary
- route direct-handle iMessage media sends through `send-attachment` instead of the legacy RPC `send` + `file` path
- send captioned media as an attachment handoff followed by a normal text message
- add regression coverage for direct-handle media-only, direct-handle captioned media, and explicit-chat captioned media

## Test Plan
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts -t "routes DM handle media-only sends through send-attachment|sends DM handle media captions as attachment plus follow-up text|sends explicit chat media captions as attachment plus follow-up text"`
- [x] `pnpm vitest run extensions/imessage/src/send.test.ts`
- [ ] `pnpm test:extension imessage` currently hits a pre-existing unrelated failure on `extensions/imessage/src/monitor.media-policy.test.ts` on clean `origin/main` as well

## Notes
- AI-assisted: yes
- This PR is intentionally scoped to the iMessage media handoff fix only.
- Verified the unrelated `monitor.media-policy` failure on a clean `origin/main` worktree before noting it here.

Closes #87597
target.author: hoyalim
